hero.subtitle: I design, document, and validate automation solutions — AI voice and SMS agents, workflows, and APIs — that cut the manual work out of your operation.

about.title: The bridge between business and technology
about.text: Over 5 years translating business needs into requirements technical teams can build without ambiguity — across banking, enterprise, and AI automation.

ctaBand.title: Got a process eating your team's hours?
ctaBand.text: Tell me how it runs today and I'll propose how to automate it.

about.title: Byron González
about.intro1: I started on the content and QA side at Colgate-Palmolive, managing over 60 global sites. That's where I learned what almost nobody teaches you: projects don't fail for lack of technology — they fail because nobody properly translated what the business needed.
about.intro2: I've been that translator ever since: as a Technical Lead in banking defining a payment gateway migration, as a freelance analyst building end-to-end cloud solutions, and today as an AI consultant designing voice and SMS agents that serve real customers for a client portfolio in the UK and US.
about.intro3: My job is simple to describe and hard to do well: understand your operation, document it precisely, and design the automation solution that can actually be built — then stay until it's validated and working.

principles.title: Discovery first
principles.text: I don't propose solutions without understanding the real process. The first conversation is for diagnosing, not selling.

principles.title: Everything documented
principles.text: BPMN, UML, technical scope. If it isn't written down precisely, it can't be built or validated.

principles.title: Measurable outcomes
principles.text: Every solution defines from the design stage which metric it improves: time, errors, cost, or conversion.

principles.title: QA to the finish line
principles.text: I don't deliver paper designs: I validate flows, iterate prompts, and stay through approval.

ctaBand.title: Shall we work together?
